# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Update API response construction to return 'id' and 'name' fields instead of 'user_id' and 'full_name'.

## Commands to Apply

```bash
find . -name '*.py' -exec sed -i 's/user_id/id/g' {} +
find . -name '*.py' -exec sed -i 's/full_name/name/g' {} +
```

*Generated by [Agentic CI/CD Copilot](https://github.com/Atharv5873/Agentic-CI-CD-Copilot)*
